address.map_location: Institute of Pharmacy Nashik | Shree Panchavati Education Society, Shree Panchavati Education Society Institute of Pharmacy Sardar Shree Vallabbhai Patel Vidya Nagar, Near Nimani Bus Stand, Panchavati, Nashik, Maharashtra 422003

pos_sentences: The faculty of this college is really good and are considerate about the students the faculty members are highly experienced and good with problem solving among students the are really good mentor for students.

The fee structure for open category it 70000-80000 and scholarship covers like half of the fees and the scholarship procedure is convineant and easy also the faculty is really helpful with the process.
Also various days are celebrate like sports , gathering and many more also organized competition like poster presentation, speech compitition.
You can also take the b.pharm or phd for better education and better future.

There are various intership opportunity and the process for application is really easy and many big companies are there for internship and proper guidance is provided for the internship and all the necessary support is provided by college for internship.
Sessional exams of the college internal exams are very on easy level and it is very good for a boosting our score in semester

The eligibility of the couse is 12th pass ct & neet admission process is too easy for the mahabharata students i think in admission process there is no need to improve all are good as much as possible
neg_sentences: There is nothing nothing to my college all everything are best and goods but only one things which I don't like these is in my college there is no canteen only that is the things which I don't like my college there is no canteen...all the things are
College campus is not very impressive and the other thing I disliked is canteen is not there
Sometimes college don't look over students problem
